history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a smartphone screen with Indonesian text displayed while the phone rests on a fabric surface with colorful patterns.

The main subject is a smartphone angled diagonally in the frame, showing a dark screen with a central purple-and-green rectangular text area and a smaller circular profile icon near the top.

The setting appears to be indoors or at least in a close foreground view, with the phone placed on patterned cloth. The lighting is dim and slightly reflective, creating a glossy sheen on the phone’s screen and emphasizing the contrast between the colored text panel and the dark background.

Visual details: The purple text panel contains large white text over a gradient background. Above the panel, there is a circular icon with red and white coloring, and near the top of the screen there is a line of white text. The phone interface also shows a back arrow at the top left and a small chat/message-style icon at the top right. At the bottom, there are round reaction-like icons in yellow and red tones, and a gray circular icon with a heart shape in white near the bottom center. The patterned cloth beneath the phone includes green and yellow swirls and shapes, with teal and dark elements visible on the right side. The camera angle is tilted, focusing on the screen content, with the phone occupying most of the image.

Visible text:
Jopang
Hari In 17.2.2
Sekarang aku pah a h karan kapii? ka mi bebang kai-laki
karena seorang laki-laki pernbar delah
dan bos anuntuk memberi-
dariupkn butunya ini
contang hanya...
(Several lines of the main text are partially unclear due to blur, cropping, and glare.)

Practical Summary:
The image shows a smartphone displaying a dark interface with a highlighted purple text panel containing Indonesian sentences. The phone is resting on patterned fabric while reaction and navigation icons appear around the edges of the screen.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Sekarang aku pahan  
kemapa tukang koran  
kebanyan laki-laki  

karena sorang lelaki pernah lelaki  
dan bosen untuk memberi habar  
walaupun ia dengar respon  
tentang 2 yang tak kuning mengibtu  

hmmm  

# Structured Version

> **Sekarang aku pahan / kemapa tukang koran / kebanyan laki-laki**  
>  
> karena sorang lelaki pernah lelaki  
> dan bosen untuk memberi habar  
> walaupun ia dengar respon  
> tentang 2 yang tak kuning mengibtu  
>
> **hmmm**

# Notes

- Several lines are not fully clear due to image blur/angle. Words that appear uncertain were kept as close as possible to what’s visible (e.g., “pahan”, “kebanyan”, “mengibtu”). If you want, upload a clearer screenshot and I can re-extract with higher accuracy.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
